title: astragalus triflorus
intro: Astragalus triflorus, also known as the three-flower milkvetch or three-flower astragalus, is a type of perennial herbaceous plant in the legume family that is native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus triflorus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and improve cardiovascular health, making it a popular herb for preventing and treating various diseases, including cancer and respiratory infections. Astragalus triflorus can be prepared into various herbal products, such as capsules, tablets, teas, and tinctures, which are commonly used to promote overall well-being and longevity.
intro_study: According to "Biological & pharmaceutical bulletin", astragalus triflorus benefits include inhibiting the production of IL-6, PGE2, and LTC4, which may help suppress bacterial infection-associated preterm labor.
